creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Mergemaster already has more automated features than I'm comfortable with, 
and since you've provided no patch to implement your suggestion I have nothing 
to evaluate in terms of an actual change request.  

You should probably read the man page, especially the -U option which will 
likely do all you want and more.  


hope this helps, 

Doug
